subject: Order #TF-2341 not delivered
body: We purchased 50 user licenses for your project management tool 3 days ago but still haven't received the activation code. Our team needs it for a project kickoff tomorrow morning. Please send urgently.

subject: Missing license keys after payment
body: Payment for order #TF-2890 went through on Monday. Still no license keys in our portal. Can you check what happened? We have 50 users waiting.

subject: Order placed but no confirmation
body: I ordered an Enterprise plan upgrade yesterday (Order #TF-3012). No confirmation email, and the portal still shows Basic plan. Please fix asap – we need enterprise features for a demo.

subject: License activation delayed – order #TF-2765
body: We purchased 10 additional user slots 24 hours ago. Still cannot assign them. This is blocking our new hires. Please resolve within 2 hours.

subject: Wrong product delivered on order
body: Order #TF-1982: we ordered the 'Pro Suite' but got 'Basic Suite' licenses. Please correct this. Our sprints depend on advanced reporting.

subject: Invoice not received after order
body: Order #TF-3100 completed on May 20. No invoice in our account. Accounts payable needs it by end of week. Can you resend?

subject: Order status shows 'pending' for 2 days
body: Our order #TF-2987 still says pending. Card was charged immediately. Please advise if any problem with the order. We need the tools by Friday.

subject: Quantity mismatch on delivery
body: We ordered 100 user licenses but only 75 were added to our account. Order #TF-2456. Please add the missing 25.

subject: Order confirmation but no access
body: Got confirmation for #TF-3221. But when logging in, the system says 'no active subscription'. We have a team standup in 3 hours that needs the board view. Please help.

subject: Can't find order history
body: I need to re-download a previous invoice from order #TF-1892. But the order history page is empty. Can you email me the invoice?

subject: API returns 500 error constantly
body: Your REST API has been throwing 500 Internal Server Error for the past hour on the /tasks endpoint. We are in production. Please investigate urgently.

subject: Web app extremely slow after update
body: Since your release on June 1, loading a project takes 20+ seconds. Our team of 30 can't work efficiently. This is a critical bug for us.

subject: SSO login broken for all users
body: Our entire organization cannot log in via SAML. Getting 'authentication failed' after IdP redirect. This started 2 hours ago. Please fix asap.

subject: Mobile app crashes on Android
body: When opening any project board, the Android app crashes immediately. iOS works fine. Happening on multiple devices. Please patch.

subject: Reports not exporting to PDF
body: The 'Export to PDF' button does nothing. No error, no download. Tried different browsers. Need this for client reporting by Friday.

subject: Webhook delivery failing
body: Our webhook endpoint has not received any events since last week. Configuration looks correct. Can you check your side?

subject: Task assignment notifications not sent
body: When I assign a task to someone, no email notification is triggered. Team members are missing updates. Please restore.

subject: Search function returns incomplete results
body: Searching for old tasks by keyword returns only 10% of what we know exists. Index seems broken. Can you rebuild?

subject: Two-factor authentication loop
body: After entering TOTP, the page reloads and asks for TOTP again. Infinite loop. Cannot access our projects. Please help.

subject: Error when uploading large CSV
body: Trying to import 5000 tasks via CSV, the system returns '413 Payload Too Large'. Max size not documented. Could you increase limit or advise workaround?

subject: Overcharged on annual subscription
body: Our invoice #INV-421 shows €12,000 but our plan is €9,600 per year. Please correct and refund the overcharge.

subject: Credit card charged twice for same month
body: We were billed twice on May 1 and May 3 for the same subscription. Please reverse one charge immediately.

subject: Tax ID missing on invoices
body: All our invoices lack our VAT number (DE123456789). Could you re-issue past invoices with correct tax ID for our records?

subject: Payment not reflected on account
body: We made a bank transfer of €4,800 on May 28. Your portal still shows 'payment overdue'. Please update our account.

subject: Price increase without notice
body: Our May invoice is 15% higher than April. We did not receive any email about pricing changes. Please explain.

subject: Cancellation request – billing continues
body: We canceled our subscription on May 15 (ticket #C789). Yet we received an invoice for June. Please stop billing and refund.

subject: Cannot update payment method
body: Our credit card expired. When I try to add a new card, the page says 'update failed' with no reason. Please help before auto-billing fails.

subject: Invoice currency wrong
body: We are based in Germany and pay in EUR, but invoice #INV-512 is in USD. Please issue a correct EUR invoice.

subject: Early termination fee not agreed
body: We are ending contract early. You charged a €1,500 termination fee. Our contract does not mention this. Please remove fee.

subject: Discount not applied correctly
body: We have a 20% first-year discount code. But invoice shows full price. Please adjust and refund difference.

subject: Request refund for unused licenses
body: We paid for 100 users annually but only use 40. Can we get a pro-rated refund for the 60 unused licenses?

subject: Refund for duplicate payment
body: We accidentally paid the same invoice twice (INV-789). Please refund one payment of €2,300.

subject: Return of licenses – we switched to competitor
body: We are leaving TechFlow. We have 9 months left on our annual plan. Request refund for remaining period as per contract section 5.2.

subject: Refund for unusable API feature
body: We paid extra €500/year for API webhooks, but webhooks have never worked. Request refund of that add-on fee.

subject: Wrong subscription tier – refund difference
body: We were charged for Enterprise but we only signed up for Pro. Please refund the difference (€200/month for last 3 months).

subject: Refund for non-functional add-on
body: We bought 'Advanced Reporting' add-on for €300 but the reports are exactly the same as basic. Please refund.

subject: Cancel and refund within 14 days
body: We signed up 10 days ago and wish to cancel under EU right of withdrawal. Please refund full amount of €1,200.

subject: Partial refund for outage period
body: Your service had 48 hours of downtime last month. We request a 2/30 refund of our monthly fee (€320).

subject: Refund request – double charge for add-on
body: We were charged twice for the 'Audit Log' add-on in March and April. Please refund one charge per month.

subject: License return – purchased by mistake
body: I accidentally ordered 20 extra user licenses. Order made 1 hour ago. Can you cancel and refund?

subject: How to add team members?
body: We just signed up. Where do I add my colleagues? I can't find the 'Users' section in the dashboard. Please send instructions.

subject: Do you offer on-premises deployment?
body: We have strict data residency rules. Does TechFlow have an on-prem version? If yes, pricing?

subject: Supported file types for attachments
body: What file types can we attach to tasks? Can we attach .psd or .ai files? Documentation doesn't specify.

subject: Is there a free trial for Enterprise?
body: We want to test Enterprise features (audit logs, SSO) before committing. Do you offer a 14-day trial?

subject: GDPR compliance details
body: Can you share your Data Processing Agreement and subprocessor list? Our legal team needs it for compliance.

subject: How to export all projects?
body: We may need to migrate data. Is there a bulk export feature for all projects, tasks, and comments? Format?

subject: API rate limits?
body: What are the rate limits for the REST API? I can't find it in your API docs. We need for integration planning.

subject: Custom domain for workspace?
body: Can we use our own domain (project.ourcompany.com) instead of your subdomain? If yes, what's the setup process?

subject: Do you have a Slack integration?
body: We'd like to receive task notifications in Slack. Is there a native integration or webhook setup?

subject: What's your SLA for support tickets?
body: What are the guaranteed response times for different priorities? We need this for our internal vendor assessment.

subject: Worst support experience ever
body: We've been waiting 5 days for a reply on ticket #12345. This is completely unacceptable for a paid service. We are considering switching vendors and will tell everyone in our network.

subject: Billing error ignored for weeks
body: I reported a double charge on May 10, and your team did nothing. Now you charge late fees? This is outrageous. Escalate to your manager now.

subject: Lack of transparency on data breach
body: We heard from a third party that you had a security incident last month. Why were customers not notified? This is a serious compliance violation.

subject: Sales team promised features that don't exist
body: Your sales rep told us 'automatic time tracking' exists. After paying, we learned it's not a feature. This is false advertising. I want a refund and an apology.

subject: Account deactivated without notice
body: You deactivated our account for 'non-payment' despite us showing bank statements. We lost 3 days of work. This is completely unacceptable.

subject: Support agent rude and unhelpful
body: Agent John D. told me 'read the docs' and closed my ticket. I am escalating to your CEO. This is how you treat paying customers?

subject: Repeated downtime – violating SLA
body: Your service had 4 outages this month, total 6 hours. Our SLA says 99.9% uptime. We demand service credits as per contract.

subject: Hidden fees discovered
body: You charged us €500 for 'API overage' without any warning or documentation on limits. This feels like a scam. Remove the charge.

subject: Lost our project data
body: A project with 3 months of work disappeared from your platform. Support says 'cannot restore'. This is catastrophic. Legal will be in touch.

subject: Automatic renewal ignored cancellation
body: We cancelled in writing 30 days before renewal. You renewed anyway and charged our card. This is illegal. Refund immediately or we dispute.
